_comment: Fake ValueCommerce affiliate Order Report API XML response: a SHORT page (3 rows < the requested 1000), terminating the pagination loop. Introduces merchant 3003, which never appears on page 1, proving page-2 rows flow through a full pull. Synthetic data; no real credentials or account data.
xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Result>
  <Transactions>
    <Transaction><transactionId>T-21000</transactionId><merchantId>2001</merchantId><merchantName>Example Books Ltd</merchantName><approvalStatus>a</approvalStatus><amount>1000</amount><reward>50</reward><currency>JPY</currency><orderDate>2026-04-21 10:00:00</orderDate></Transaction>
    <Transaction><transactionId>T-21001</transactionId><merchantId>3003</merchantId><merchantName>Page Two Homeware KK</merchantName><approvalStatus>p</approvalStatus><amount>1010</amount><reward>51</reward><currency>JPY</currency><orderDate>2026-04-22 10:00:00</orderDate></Transaction>
    <Transaction><transactionId>T-21002</transactionId><merchantId>3003</merchantId><merchantName>Page Two Homeware KK</merchantName><approvalStatus>i</approvalStatus><amount>1020</amount><reward>52</reward><currency>JPY</currency><orderDate>2026-04-23 10:00:00</orderDate></Transaction>
  </Transactions>
</Result>
